div.div:
② 特征估计
R(a) = bytes/Δ
F̂(a) = −m·ln(Z/m)
P(a) = Σ𝟙[a∈H]

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(250, 229, 211), rgb(53, 35, 19)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(230, 126, 34), rgb(192, 102, 23));

div.div:
③ 可疑度计算
归一化: R̃, F̃, P̃
S(a) = αR̃ + βF̃ + γP̃
rank = g(S(a))
